chunks.title: Monthly Army Divisions
chunks.reason: A catalog listing the commanders and troop counts for each of the twelve months.

chunks.title: Tribal Princes
chunks.reason: A list identifying the chief officers appointed over each of the tribes of Israel.

chunks.title: The Unfinished Census
chunks.reason: A narrative note explaining why a specific census was not included in the royal records.

chunks.title: Royal Estate Officials
chunks.reason: A catalog of officials managing the king's storehouses, agriculture, and livestock.

chunks.title: Royal Advisors and Commanders
chunks.reason: A list of key counselors, scribes, and the final commander of the army.
